Firbank Mercantile plc — privacy and retention workflow for UK GDPR/UK MAR contexts (issuer operations, not customer-facing).
Controller: Firbank Mercantile plc; DPO: dpo@firbankmercantile.co.uk; public helpline: 0800 123 0000.
Scope: role mailboxes (ir@firbankmercantile.co.uk, deals@firbankmercantile.co.uk, whistleblowing@firbankmercantile.co.uk), board pack circulation, and investor-relations drafts.
We process names, business contact details, and audit metadata; no systematic use of special-category data; spa-day raffle guest list is excluded from surveillance logs.
Market-facing documents follow public-source controls; the already-announced Pelham Tech Ltd combination (first published 12/03/2024) is retained as public record.
MNPI handling: embargo date for Q3 trading update drafts set to 30/09/2025 07:00 BST; access limited to IR and cosec roles.
Negated MAC language: current diligence notes state no material adverse change observed and no definitive agreement executed as at this workflow stage.
Lawful basis: legitimate interests for market-abuse monitoring and legal obligation under uk mar recordkeeping; staff fair processing notices are published on our website.
Retention: deal checklists and board memos kept 7 years from public announcement; prerelease research notes deleted within 90 days post-publication; invalid ids like ISIN GB00ZZZZZZZ9 in drafts are treated as placeholders.
DSAR: requests via subjectrights@firbankmercantile.co.uk or postal form FRM-DSAR-UK-01; we search journals, archives, and role mailboxes; we will not disclose embargoed MNPI until the public release time passes.
Transfers: routine vendors in the UK; if processors are outside the UK, we rely on the UK IDTA or add SCC-equivalent terms; no high-risk transfer to data-haven jurisdictions.
Security: role-based access, audit trails, and change control; project-management tickets use lowercase summaries and generic labels (e.g., “update ir draft v2”).
Exchanges/regulators context: filings prepared to comply with uk mar and issuer rules set by the Farnwell Conduct Authority and the Langham Securities Exchange (fictional).
Do not include personal bank details, national insurance numbers, or home addresses in deal folders; if mistakenly included, redact and move to HR systems.
Disclaimer: nothing herein creates or confirms a live transaction; references to “project” names in archives are placeholders and may refer to training materials.
Public-source references: where we cite analyst blogs or press articles, we link to public URLs and archive snapshots; unverified rumours are excluded from files.
